data.body: Consideration: [Completeness] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md — CLAUDE.md references plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md as the authoritative config key registry. Story F must update this file (not just dso-config.conf's comment block) with all new confluence.* keys, their types, defaults, and absence behavior. Operators consulting CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md will otherwise see an incomplete picture of the available configuration surface. Add to done definitions: 'When this story is complete, plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md includes entries for all new confluence.* config keys introduced by this epic.' (taxonomy: consumer_impact)
